input: Run error handling on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected error handling output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the error handling workflow

input: Apply error handling to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive error handling analysis with evidence-tagged findings

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to error handling
